title: stevenia dahurica
intro: Stevenia dahurica is a plant species native to Asia, commonly known as Dahurian angelica or Chinese angelica, belonging to the Apiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Stevenia dahurica include its ability to lower fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and improve cardiovascular health. Stevenia dahurica is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
